title: Ferenc Farkas - Audio metadata
description: Describes a set of audio excerpts

id.description:
The unique id of the audio excerpt.
Should match the work's id when there is only one excerpt. When there are multiple excerpts, append a number or short description separated by '-'.
Examples: old-hungarian-dances, old-hungarian-dances-1, old-hungarian-dances-quasi-menuetto.

description.description: Label displayed alongside the play icon on the website (e.g. movement name, character of the excerpt).

cd.description:
Reference to the source CD the excerpt was sampled from.
Two kinds of source CDs are indexed:
- Archive CDs: prefix 'a' followed by the archive number (e.g. 'a76').
- Published CDs: prefix 'p' followed by the catalogue number (e.g. 'p122').
Must be present together with 'track'.

track.description: Track number on the source CD. Must be present together with 'cd'.

start.description:
Start position within the track in seconds (decimals allowed for sub-second precision).
Use when the excerpt does not begin at the start of the track.

end.description:
End position within the track in seconds (decimals allowed for sub-second precision).
Published CD excerpts should not exceed 30 seconds.

ref.description:
Path to a local audio file (not yet implemented).
Will follow the same convention as the 'ref' field in score.json: a unix-style path relative to the AUDIOS_ROOT environment variable.
